debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
S : Error.Dist n
a b : Error.Agent n
C : Error.Call n
σ : List (Error.Call n)
IH :
  ∀ (o : Error.maxOne n σ)
    (a_kv_b :
      Error.eval n S ⟨σ, o⟩
        (Error.Form.Neg n
          (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
            (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))),
    (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨σ, o⟩
o : Error.maxOne n (C :: σ)
a_kv_b :
  Error.eval n S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩
    (Error.Form.Neg n
      (Error.Form.Con n (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, true))))
        (Error.Form.Neg n (Error.Form.K n a (Error.Form.Has n b (b, false))))))
ra : Error.roleOfIn n a C = Error.Role.Callee
⊢ (b, @S b) ∈ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩ ∧ (b, !@S b) ∉ Error.resultSet n a S ⟨C :: σ, o⟩

failed_attempts:
simp [eval, stubbornness] at ak; specialize ak T ⟨D :: τ, len_τ⟩ equ
            simp [stubbornness] at ak; rw [ak] at h_eval; simp at h_eval

rw [ra]
      apply IH (⁻o)
      rwa [not_in_call_then_invariant_kv ra] at a_kv_b

· specialize IH (⁻o) h
        unfold resultSet
        simp [ra]
        cases C <;> rcases ra with ⟨ra1, ra2⟩ <;> subst ra2 <;> simp_all
        all_goals
          refine ⟨⟨or.inr IH.1, ?_⟩, ?_⟩
          · intro hyp; apply IH.2; exact true_of_knowldege hyp
          · intro hyp; apply IH.2; exact true_of_knowldege hyp S ⟨σ,⁻o⟩ rfl equiv_refl
      · sorry
    case Other =>
      rw [not_in_call_then_invariant_resultSet ra]
      apply IH
      rwa [not_in_call_then_invariant_kv ra] at a_kv_b

· specialize IH (⁻o) h
        unfold resultSet; simp [ra]
        rcases ra with ⟨_, ra2⟩; subst ra2
        cases C <;> simp [roleOfIn] <;> refine ⟨⟨Or.inr IH.1, ?_⟩, ?_⟩ <;> all_goals sorry
      · sorry

simp only
      rw [not_in_call_then_invariant_kv ra] at a_kv_b
      exact IH (⁻o) a_kv_b

sorry
    case Other =>
      rw [not_in_call_then_invariant_kv ra, not_in_call_then_invariant_resultSet ra]
      exact IH (⁻o) a_kv_b
